release_notes: Drop probe --v=1. The 0.3.70 cmd.exe stdio wrapper captured chrome's stderr and revealed chrome was actually starting fine — it was IO-bound writing thousands of 'Field trial: X Group choice: Y' VERBOSE1 lines synchronously to its own log file before the 60-second probe watchdog killed it. With --v=1 removed and only --enable-logging=stderr left, chrome should now reach the page load step. We still capture WARN/ERROR/FATAL.
